title: Record: Depth Recurrence + SGD TTT : 1.1182 BPB
body:
## Summary

- **val_bpb: 1.1182** on 8×H100 SXM, seed 1337  
- **Key innovation: Depth Recurrence** — repeat layers 4,5 for 13 virtual layers from 11 physical at zero parameter cost. First successful use on the leaderboard.  
- Legal score-first SGD TTT (3ep, all blocks unfrozen) provides -0.0026 BPB on top  

## Architecture

Built on PR #549 (LeakyReLU² + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon, 1.1194 BPB) with:
- Depth Recurrence on layers 4,5 (13 virtual layers from 11 physical)  
- SGD TTT (lr=0.002, momentum=0.9, 3 epochs, 32K chunks)  
- BigramHash(2048), XSA4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128, EMA+SWA  
- Int6 GPTQ-lite + lzma compression (15.93 MB artifact)  
- SDPA fallback for non-FA3 environments  

## Results

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Pre-TTT int6 sliding window BPB | 1.1208 |
| **Post-TTT BPB** | **1.1182** |
| TTT gain | -0.0026 |
| step_avg | 98.23ms |
| Steps | 6,109 |
| Artifact | 15,930,486 bytes |
